title: Gulp Rush
mechanic: grow-by-absorbing arena (Hole.io / Katamari family): drag a hungry void around a top-down town in portrait, swallow objects below your current size tier, grow each gulp and tier up, race an AI rival for the most mass before the round timer; twist = bombs cost mass (risk) + head-to-head rival (competition) + meta upgrades between rounds
twist: danger-tier bombs subtract mass + head-to-head AI rival race; not a bare Hole.io clone
art: procedural vector void + tiered town props + AI cover/icon
source: 2026-06-14 digest curation: telegram Build Today was all dupes; this is the validated mechanic gap (telegram absorb theme + Play Store 'All in Hole' #8). Tim picked 'Build Hole.io (twisted)'.
